Questions about participants financial situation - Covid wave 3 questionnaire. This question was not asked in wave 1 or 2.

SOC 2020 Covid wave 3 76-78 2021 Yes Yes Potential low cell counts issue Asked to those that had a job change since the start of the Coronavirus outbreak in March 2020. Questions about participants financial situation - Covid wave 3 questionnaire. This question was not asked in wave 1 or 2.

CVDW1_timefrtvg Specialist questionnaire data Covid questionnaires Lifestyle habits cw1_frtvegpp_v2 12292 In the month before the Coronavirus outbreak, how many portions of fresh fruit and vegetables did you eat in a typical day - Covid wave 1 (age 74 years) {-7.0} No data {-8.0} No information {-9.0} Unknown portions Covid wave 1 73 2020 Yes No A portion of fruit could be a whole piece of fruit, like an apple or banana or 80g of fruit. A portion of veg is 3 heaped tablespoons of cooked vegetables or beans. Does not include potatoes. Questions about smoking, drinking alcohol, exercise, diet and sleep

CW1_COVID Specialist questionnaire data Covid questionnaires Lifestyle habits cw1_frtvegpp 12294 In the month before the Coronavirus outbreak, how many portions of fresh fruit and vegetables did you eat in a typical day - Covid wave 1 (age 74 years) {-1.0} Not applicable {-7.0} No questionnaire {-8.0} No information {-9.0} Unknown portions Covid wave 1 73 2020 No Yes Potential low cell counts issue. Recoded version is available. A portion of fruit could be a whole piece of fruit, like an apple or banana or 80g of fruit. A portion of veg is 3 heaped tablespoons of cooked vegetables or beans. Questions about smoking, drinking alcohol, exercise, diet and sleep. Not asked in wave 2.
CW1_COVID Specialist questionnaire data Covid questionnaires Lifestyle habits cw1_frtvegsp 12295 Since the start of the Coronavirus outbreak, how many portions of fresh fruit and vegetables have you eaten in a typical day - Covid wave 1 (age 74 years) {-1.0} Not applicable {-7.0} No questionnaire {-8.0} No information {-9.0} Unknown portions Covid wave 1 74 2020 No Yes Potential low cell counts issue. Recoded version is available. A portion of fruit could be a whole piece of fruit, like an apple or banana or 80g of fruit. A portion of veg is 3 heaped tablespoons of cooked vegetables or beans. Questions about smoking, drinking alcohol, exercise, diet and sleep. Not asked in wave 2.

DEWH97 Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire General health enme97 20810 Has a doctor ever diagnosed endometriosis?- at age 51 {-4.0} Unknown {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {9.0} Unknown Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 56(a) 1997 No No Menstral and other gynaecological problems. Endometiosis - A condition of abnormal growth and function of the lining of the uterus (womb). Sometimes this occurs outside the uterus itself
DEWH97 Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire General health enml 20811 Was the diagnosis [of endometriosis] made after laparoscopy?- at age 51 {-1.0} Unknown {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {8.0} Not applicable {9.0} Unknown Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 56(b) 1997 No No Menstral and other gynaecological problems. Laparoscopy - An operation during which a thin telescope (a laparoscope) is inserted near the navel so the doctor can see the abdominal cavity
DEWH97 Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire General health enma 20812 At what age was this diagnosis [of endometriosis] made?- at age 51 {-9.0} Unknown {2.0} 20-29 years {3.0} 30-39 years {4.0} 40-49 years {5.0} Since aged 50 years {8.0} Not applicable Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 56(c) 1997 No No Menstral and other gynaecological problems
DEWH97 Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire General health pvie97 20813 Have you ever been treated in a doctor's surgery, clinic, emergency room or hospital for pelvic inflammatory disease? - at age 51 {-4.0} Unknown {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {9.0} Unknown Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 57 1997 No No Menstral and other gynaecological problems. An infection of the fallopian tubes, uterus (womb), or overies. Also call Salpingitis, endometritis, oophoritis, pelvic infection

DEWH97 Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire Children pnd 20829 Did you suffer from postnatal depression (as described in questionnaire) after the birth of any of your children?- at age 51 years {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {6.0} Unknown {7.0} Unknown {8.0} Not applicable {9.0} Unknown Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 60 1997 Yes No Childbirth and postnatal depression. Postnatal dpression defined as "A period of a few weeks or months starting in the first year after giving birth to a baby when you felt depressed or low-spirited or rather anxious with times of panic. During this time you slpet, wept very frequently, daily or almost daily, could not really laugh or enjoy anything, felt irritable and in prro temper and felt alful for much of the time.

womenhlth_uincont Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire Incontinence stress94 22029 Stress incontinence (derived) 1994 - at age 48 years {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {9.0} Missing {99.0} Non-respondent/ Not appropriate(including men) Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 18, 20(a) 1994 Yes No This variable is derived from 2 items: Women who replied positively to the question “Do you ever lose any urine when you cough, sneeze, laugh, run or exercise” and those who provided response of “less than once a month” to “daily” to the question “..during the last 12 months how often have you lost any urine when you did not mean to ..’’ were considered as showing symptoms of stress incontinence
womenhlth_uincont Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire Incontinence stress95 22029 Stress incontinence (derived) 1995 - at age 49 years {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {9.0} Missing {99.0} Non-respondent/ Not appropriate(including men) Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 18(a), 19 1995 Yes No This variable is derived from 2 items: Women who replied positively to the question “Do you ever lose any urine when you cough, sneeze, laugh, run or exercise” and those who provided response of “less than once a month” to “daily” to the question “..during the last 12 months how often have you lost any urine when you did not mean to ..’’ were considered as showing symptoms of stress incontinence

womenhlth_uincont Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire Incontinence stress00 22029 Stress incontinence (derived) 2000 - at age 54 years {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {9.0} Missing {99.0} Non-respondent/ Not appropriate(including men) Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 18(a), 19 2000 Yes No This variable is derived from 2 items: Women who replied positively to the question “Do you ever lose any urine when you cough, sneeze, laugh, run or exercise” and those who provided response of “less than once a month” to “daily” to the question “..during the last 12 months how often have you lost any urine when you did not mean to ..’’ were considered as showing symptoms of stress incontinence
womenhlth_uincont Specialist questionnaire data Womens health questionnaire Incontinence urge94 22030 Urge incontinence (derived) 1994 - at age 48 years {-9.0} Unknown {0.0} No {1.0} Yes {9.0} Missing {99.0} Non-respondent/ Not appropriate(including men) Not applicable Woman's Health Questionnaire 19(a), 19(b) 1994 Yes No This variable is derived from 3 items: Women who replied positively both to the question “do you ever have an urgent and strong desire to pass urine which is difficult to control?” and to the followup question “do you ever lose any urine before you reach the toilet?” and those who provided response of “less than once a month” to “daily” to the question “..during the last 12 months how often have you lost any urine when you did not mean to ..’’
